signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (up from 2.0%), missing forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

This March figure—released around early April 2026 per standard schedules—marks the latest confirmed data amid Middle East tensions driving oil volatility, but it eased monthly pressures and stayed near the Bank of Korea's 2% target, unlikely to shift prediction markets
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
